data.title: XRP Has Been Building This Pattern For 9 Years: Is The Breakout Finally Here?
data.description: XRP is currently trading within a massive 9-year ascending triangle pattern on the monthly chart, while experiencing a significant surge in options volume by 215.78% to reach $3.76 million. The pattern has been consistent since 2017, with XRP repeatedly hitting the upper resistance, facing rejection, and retracing to find support at the rising trendline. Following a recent rejection in August 2025, analysts anticipate a retest of the macro support level ranging between $0.75 and $0.80. This zone is seen as a prime "buy the dip" opportunity before the triangle nears its apex. The Paris Blockchain Week XRP Ledger is set to take center stage during the upcoming Paris Blockchain Week. Analysts suggest that once the 9-year consolidation pattern is broken, a significant historic move can be expected. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Marine Corps University Foundation Honors Bob Parsons at 2026 Semper Fidelis Award Ceremony
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, on March 28, 2026, The Marine Corps University Foundation (MCUF) held the 2026 Semper Fidelis Award Ceremony & Dinner at The Ritz-Carlton, Pentagon City. This annual event honors exceptional service and achievements.

data.title: Navy Federal’s Cost of Car Ownership (COCO) Index Shows Spike in Vehicle Ownership Costs Driven by Gasoline Prices
data.description: In Vienna, Va., Navy Federal Credit Union unveiled its most recent Cost of Car Ownership (COCO) Index, showcasing a new peak in vehicle ownership expenses. March saw a 4.7% surge in the COCO Index, marking a 5.5% increase over the past year and a substantial 47.6% rise since January 2020. The hike is mainly attributed to a drastic upsurge in gasoline prices, which spiked 21.2% from the previous month. This significant rise in fuel costs is posing a financial burden on households, along with ongoing high auto repair expenses.

data.title: Vitruvius Built Founder Named to LUXE NEXT 2026, Firm Represented Among Only Four General Contractors Nationwide
data.description: In Park City, Utah on April 13, 2026, Charles Ochello Jr., the Founder and CEO of Vitruvius Built, was honored with a spot in the prestigious LUXE NEXT Class of 2026 by LUXE Interiors + Design. This recognition was bestowed by one of the leading publications in the realm of luxury residential design. The list celebrates innovative individuals in the industry who show exceptional promise and talent, ensuring a bright future.

data.title: WARNER MUSIC GROUP ANNOUNCES STRATEGIC INVESTMENT AND EXPANSIVE PARTNERSHIP WITH TUSTREAMS
data.description: Warner Music Group (Nasdaq: WMG) revealed a significant collaboration with TuStreams, a prominent independent entity in the thriving Música Mexicana scene. This global alliance, announced on April 13, 2026 in New York, aims to expedite the international expansion of TuStreams. The partnership is a strategic move by WMG to capitalize on the robust growth of the Música Mexicana genre. This deal signifies a milestone for both companies and signifies a positive trajectory for the genre's influence on a worldwide scale.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Golden Gate University/
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Golden Gate University unveiled GGU Digital, an AI Global Education Platform. The university shared this news via PR Newswire. A spokesperson mentioned that the initial image included has been replaced with an updated version.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Oracle Soars On This; Stock Clears Entry Amid Hormuz Blockade (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones experienced an increase on the stock market. The software corporation Oracle saw a significant rise in its stock value due to excitement surrounding artificial intelligence. Similarly, Microsoft had a notable increase, whereas Goldman Sachs saw a decline. Overall, the stock market experienced positive movement with the Dow Jones up. This news was published on Investor's Business Daily covering live updates on the stock market performance including Oracle's surge and the Dow's boost.

data.title: Seeing is Believing: West Palm Beach Brings Downtown to Life Through the "DowntownWPB Unlocked" Immersive Augmented Reality Tour
data.description: An exciting opportunity has arisen for visitors to discover over 30 sites showcasing art, music, and history in West Palm Beach, Florida through a new smartphone application. Launched in partnership with Hoverlay, the WPB Downtown Development Authority introduced the app on April 13, 2026, offering a wide range of hidden gems accessible to users for free.

data.title: CBDfx Stresses Commitment to Responsible Farming, Manufacturing, and Distribution
data.description: CBDfx, a prominent supplier of CBD and adaptogenic mushroom wellness products, recently announced their continued dedication to sustainable practices in farming, production, and distribution. Noted for their pioneering role in the industry since 2014, CBDfx continues to prioritize responsible operations.

data.title: Trader profits $252K from $500 investment due to UFC scoring mistake.
data.description: A trader on Polymarket made $252,000 in profits by capitalizing on a scoring mistake made by the UFC.

data.title: Price of HOLO token moving towards $0.08 resistance amidst recent momentum; potential for further upward movement.
data.description: Traders are closely monitoring HOLO's price action as the token nears important resistance levels. Technical analysis indicates a possibility of further upward movement if current trends persist.

data.title: NMHC Joins HUD Secretary Turner and Congressman Evans in Tour of Build-to-Rent Community
data.description: In Washington, the President of the National Multifamily Housing Council (NMHC) Sharon Wilson Géno, along with NMHC Members Jared Ford and Josh Hartmann, joined HUD Secretary Scott Turner and Congressman Gabe Evans on a visit to a Build-to-Rent (BTR) community in Colorado. The tour aimed to highlight the importance of BTR homes in addressing the housing affordability crisis faced by families nationwide. Build-to-Rent properties provide a tangible and prompt resolution to the pressing issue of finding affordable housing.

data.title: PERFECT GAME PARTNERS WITH THREE MLB CLUBS TO OFFER EXCLUSIVE TICKET DISCOUNTS FOR YOUTH TEAMS
data.description: Today in Sanford, Florida, Perfect Game, the leading youth baseball and softball platform and scouting service, revealed a new fan involvement effort with support from three Major League Baseball teams: the Kansas City Royals, Houston Astros, and St. Louis Cardinals. This initiative aims to enhance the experience for the estimated 500,000 fans who attend Perfect Game events annually.
